creator: anarcat@dojo.tao.ca
text:
As specified in the 2nd PR, the patches are no longer necessary for the 
ecasound port.

Again, the patches should be _removed_.

Thanks,

A.

Jimmy Olgeni <olgeni@FreeBSD.org> said: 

> 
> I get this error message:
> 
> ===>  Extracting for ecasound-1.9dev5
> >> Checksum OK for ecasound-1.9dev5.tar.gz.
> ===>   ecasound-1.9dev5 depends on executable: gmake - found
> ===>   ecasound-1.9dev5 depends on executable: automake - found
> ===>   ecasound-1.9dev5 depends on executable: autoconf - found
> ===>   ecasound-1.9dev5 depends on executable: libtool - found
> ===>  Patching for ecasound-1.9dev5
> ===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for ecasound-1.9dev5
> Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
> 1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to config.h.in.rej
> >> Patch patch-aa failed to apply cleanly.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Is files/patch-aa still needed? diff says "Only in
> /usr/ports/audio/ecasound/: files" so maybe you removed some patches
> in your new port version.
> 
> -- 
> jimmy
> 
>
